name: Trace Craft
description: Test your precision and creativity in Draw Master! Look at the shape shown above and recreate it by drawing the correct lines. Start with simple shapes and gradually face more complex designs that challenge your accuracy and control. Every level pushes your drawing skills further as patterns become trickier and require careful attention. Easy to begin but increasingly challenging, Draw Master is the perfect test of focus, patience, and steady hands. Can you master every shape and prove your drawing skills?
instructions: Look at the shape shown at the top of the screen Draw the shape by tracing the correct lines Try to match the shape as accurately as possible Complete the drawing to finish the level Advance to new levels where shapes become more complex
